results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - MCP-facing query verb layer that serves graph_report/impact/path-style requests
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - indexing pipeline that sweeps files, extracts symbols, and writes the code graph
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - freshness/orchestration layer that ensures the graph is up to date before queries

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - primary MCP query surface; exposes the repo graph verbs users call
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - core indexing pipeline; sweeps files, resolves symbols, and builds graph data
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/languages - language-specific extractors/parsers for JavaScript, PHP, and Python

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - MCP query verb surface that serves the graph tools exposed to clients
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/languages - language-specific symbol extraction and parsing for indexing
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - core indexing pipeline that sweeps files, resolves symbols, and builds the graph

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP-facing tool layer; `server.js` registers these verbs and they serve report/path/impact/file/onboard queries.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - indexing pipeline; walks the repo, runs language extractors, fingerprints symbols, and emits graph nodes/edges.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/storage - SQLite persistence layer; defines schema and read/write access for the `.aify-graph/graph.sqlite` code graph.

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - extraction pipeline; sweep, language extractors, and resolver turn repo files into graph nodes and edges
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - indexing control plane; manifest, git diffing, and locks decide rebuild vs incremental refresh on each query
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP query surface; verb handlers, ranking, and rendering shape what agents get back

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP-facing verb layer; `server.js` wires `graph_*` tools to these handlers and compact renderers
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - manifest/git/lock orchestration that decides when to rebuild and keeps `.aify-graph` current
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - tree-sitter indexing pipeline: filesystem sweep, language extractors, framework plugins, and cross-file resolution
